site.title: Marc Glass Strategic Communications and Photography

home.hero_tagline: Award-winning writer, photographer, and communications strategist with decades of experience crafting compelling narratives across print, digital, and social media platforms.
home.cta_banner_text: Available for writing assignments, photography projects, communications consulting, and speaking engagements.

about.headline: Writer. Photographer. Communications Strategist.
about.bio_paragraph_1: This is where your bio goes. Replace this placeholder text with your own story — your background, your areas of expertise, the publications and clients you've worked with, and what drives your work.
about.bio_paragraph_2: You might talk about your journalism career, your photography practice, and how the two disciplines inform each other. Mention notable projects, awards, or recognitions that establish your credibility and voice.
about.bio_paragraph_3: A third paragraph might speak to your approach — your philosophy as a storyteller, what you look for in a story, and the kinds of clients or collaborations you're most interested in pursuing.

faq.question: What kinds of writing projects do you take on?
faq.answer: Replace this with your actual answer. I work on feature journalism, investigative reporting, profiles, essays, and editorial commentary for publications ranging from regional outlets to national magazines. I'm also available for branded content, white papers, and long-form web copy.

faq.question: Are you available for photography assignments outside Maine?
faq.answer: Replace this with your actual answer. Yes — I travel for documentary, portrait, and editorial assignments. My home base is Maine, but I've worked throughout New England and beyond. Travel costs are discussed as part of project scoping.

faq.question: How does your communications consulting work?
faq.answer: Replace this with your actual answer. I work with organizations and individuals to develop communications strategies, craft key messages, manage media relationships, and create the written and visual content that brings those strategies to life. Engagements range from one-time projects to ongoing retainer arrangements.

faq.question: What is your typical turnaround time?
faq.answer: Replace this with your actual answer. Turnaround depends on the scope and complexity of the project. For shorter pieces, I can often turn around a first draft within a week. Larger projects are scoped and scheduled individually. I'm happy to discuss your timeline during our initial conversation.

faq.question: Do you offer speaking engagements or workshops?
faq.answer: Replace this with your actual answer. Yes. I speak on topics including visual storytelling, narrative journalism, communications strategy, and the intersection of photography and writing. I also lead workshops for journalists, communications professionals, and organizations. Reach out through the contact page to discuss.

writing.page_description: A selection of published work spanning feature journalism, investigative reporting, and editorial commentary across leading regional and national publications.
